pageDescription: Calculate Weight Watchers points based on food items and nutritional information

old.title: Old Points System
old.description: Based on protein, carbs, fat, and calories

new.title: SmartPoints System
new.description: Emphasizes protein and minimizes sugar and saturated fat

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides estimates only and is not a diagnostic tool
criticalWarningsList.individualVariation: Points needs vary based on individual factors

importantNotesList: The new SmartPoints system is more nutritionally balanced
Personal points allowance depends on age, gender, height, and activity level
Consult Weight Watchers for personalized plans
Points should be considered alongside overall healthy eating habits

messages.enterMeasurements: Enter your measurements to calculate your Weight Watchers points
messages.pointsResult: Your daily Weight Watchers points allowance is {points}
messages.ageWarning: Points calculations may vary for different age groups

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides estimates based on mathematical formulas and should not be used as a substitute for professional Weight Watchers guidance. Individual results may vary based on factors not accounted for in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Consult Weight Watchers
seekHelp.content: For accurate points calculations and personalized weight loss plans, please consult with Weight Watchers or a registered dietitian who can provide guidance based on your complete health history and individual circumstances.

errors.heightCm: Please enter valid height in cm

tooltips.activity: Your regular activity level affects your points allowance

enter_nutritional_information_to_calcula: Enter nutritional information to calculate Weight Watchers SmartPoints
total_calories_in_the_food_item_3: Total calories in the food item
points_00305_calories_0275_saturated_fat:
Points = (0.0305 × Calories) + (0.275 ×
                        Saturated Fat) + (0.12 × Sugar) - (0.098 × Protein)
result_is_rounded_to_the_nearest_whole_n: Result is rounded to the nearest whole number
sugar_and_saturated_fat_increase_points_: Sugar and saturated fat increase points
result_is_rounded_to_nearest_whole_numbe: Result is rounded to nearest whole number
use_nutrition_labels_for_accurate_values: Use nutrition labels for accurate values
this_calculator_uses_the_smartpoints_for:
This calculator uses the SmartPoints formula from December 2015 to November 2021. Weight
                          Watchers has since updated their system. For current Weight Watchers programs, please refer to
                          their official app and materials.
